_comment: Bundled MCP servers. Both are remote streamable-HTTP servers authenticated per-user via OAuth on first use — nothing is stored in this file, and each user logs into their own account. (1) Semrush for live SEO/keyword/competitive data; for headless/CI without OAuth, add "headers": { "Authorization": "Apikey YOUR_API_KEY" } (key from https://www.semrush.com/accounts/profile/api). (2) Higgsfield for AI image/video generation (e.g. blog featured images); authenticate against your own Higgsfield account. See README.md > 'Connect data sources'.
